uplink.description: port 1, format 0x20, all fields: env block with atmospheric pressure, PM/AQI, dust bins, TVOC, battery + diagnostics
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (vbat 3.7 V, vsys 3.3 V, vbus 5.0 V, boot 7, t 22.5 degC, p 1013.24 hPa atmospheric, rh 55%, PM1.0/2.5/10 = 12/18/25 ug/m3, full dust bins, TVOC 1500). expected.data authored here; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Decoder), which yields the same vbat/vsys/vbus/boot/t/p/rh/pm/dust/aqi/aqi_partial/tvoc values.

uplink.description: port 1, format 0x21 (no barometer): battery + env (temp/RH, no pressure) + PM/AQI only
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload, format 0x21 omits barometric pressure (PMS7003 without BME280). flags = 0x31 (vbat | env | particulate). expected.data authored here; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js, which yields the same vbat/t/rh/pm/aqi/aqi_partial (and the derived tDew that we drop).
Upstream Decoder returns null for any port other than 1 or 5; we surface an explicit error.

uplink.description: supported port but truncated environment block -> error
uplink._note: flags = 0x10 (env present) on format 0x20 needs 6 trailing bytes; only 1 is present. Upstream reads past the buffer (NaN); we report truncation.
